501             CountedStars AS (
502                 SELECT namespace, name, COUNT(account_id) as num_stars,
503                 CASE WHEN MAX(account_id = :star_point_of_view) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as starred_by_pov,
504                 CASE WHEN MAX(account_id = :starred_by) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as starred_by_target
505                 FROM stars
506                 GROUP BY namespace, name
507             ),
508             CountedForks AS (
509                 SELECT
510                     category as counted_forks_category,
511                     from_namespace as counted_forks_from_namespace,
512                     from_name as counted_forks_from_name,
513                     COUNT(to_namespace) as num_forks
514                 FROM forks
515                 GROUP BY counted_forks_category, counted_forks_from_namespace, counted_forks_from_name
516             ),
517             Fork AS (
518                 SELECT
519                     category as fork_category,
520                     from_namespace as fork_from_namespace,
521                     from_name as fork_from_name,
522                     to_namespace as fork_to_namespace,
523                     to_name as fork_to_name
524                 FROM forks
525             )
526             SELECT
527                 registry.id, registry.namespace, registry.name, registry.version,
528                 registry.category, registry.description, registry.details, registry.time,
529                 CountedStars.num_stars, CountedStars.starred_by_pov, CountedForks.num_forks,
530                 Fork.fork_from_namespace, Fork.fork_from_name
531             FROM registry_entry registry
532             LEFT JOIN CountedStars
533                 ON registry.namespace = CountedStars.namespace AND registry.name = CountedStars.name
534             LEFT JOIN CountedForks
535                 ON registry.category = CountedForks.counted_forks_category
536                     AND registry.namespace = CountedForks.counted_forks_from_namespace
537                     AND registry.name = CountedForks.counted_forks_from_name
538             LEFT JOIN Fork
539                 ON registry.category = Fork.fork_category
540                     AND registry.namespace = Fork.fork_to_namespace
541                     AND registry.name = Fork.fork_to_name
542             {latest_version_condition}
543             WHERE show_entry >= :show_entry
544                 {category_condition}
545                 {namespace_condition}
546                 {starred_by_condition}
547                 {fork_of_condition}
548                 {custom_where_condition}
549             ORDER BY registry.id DESC
550             LIMIT :total
551             OFFSET :offset
552             """
553

560             query_text = f"""WITH
561                     CountedStars AS (
562                         SELECT namespace, name, COUNT(account_id) as num_stars,
563                         CASE WHEN MAX(account_id = :star_point_of_view) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as starred_by_pov,
564                         CASE WHEN MAX(account_id = :starred_by) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as starred_by_target
565                         FROM stars
566                         GROUP BY namespace, name
567                     ),
568                     CountedForks AS (
569                         SELECT
570                             category as counted_forks_category,
571                             from_namespace as counted_forks_from_namespace,
572                             from_name as counted_forks_from_name,
573                             COUNT(to_namespace) as num_forks
574                         FROM forks
575                         GROUP BY counted_forks_category, counted_forks_from_namespace, counted_forks_from_name
576                     ),
577                     Fork AS (
578                         SELECT
579                             category as fork_category,
580                             from_namespace as fork_from_namespace,
581                             from_name as fork_from_name,
582                             to_namespace as fork_to_namespace,
583                             to_name as fork_to_name
584                         FROM forks
585                     ),
586                     FilteredRegistry AS (
587                         SELECT
588                             registry.id, CountedStars.num_stars, CountedStars.starred_by_pov,
589                             CountedForks.num_forks, Fork.fork_from_namespace, Fork.fork_from_name
590                         FROM registry_entry registry
591                         {latest_version_condition}
592                         JOIN entry_tags ON registry.id = entry_tags.registry_id
593                         LEFT JOIN CountedStars
594                             ON registry.namespace = CountedStars.namespace
595                             AND registry.name = CountedStars.name
596                         LEFT JOIN CountedForks
597                             ON registry.category = CountedForks.counted_forks_category
598                                 AND registry.namespace = CountedForks.counted_forks_from_namespace
599                                 AND registry.name = CountedForks.counted_forks_from_name
600                         LEFT JOIN Fork
601                             ON registry.category = Fork.fork_category
602                                 AND registry.namespace = Fork.fork_to_namespace
603                                 AND registry.name = Fork.fork_to_name
604                         WHERE show_entry >= :show_entry
605                             AND entry_tags.tag IN :tags
606                             {category_condition}
607                             {namespace_condition}
608                             {starred_by_condition}
609                             {fork_of_condition}
610                             {custom_where_condition}
611                         GROUP BY registry.id
612                         HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT entry_tags.tag) = :ntags
613                     ),
614                     RankedRegistry AS (
615                         SELECT
616                             id, num_stars, starred_by_pov, num_forks, fork_from_namespace, fork_from_name,
617                             ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id DESC) AS col_rank
618                         FROM FilteredRegistry
619                     )
620 
621                     SELECT registry.id, registry.namespace, registry.name, registry.version,
622                            registry.category, registry.description, registry.details, registry.time,
623                            ranked.num_stars, ranked.starred_by_pov, num_forks, fork_from_namespace,
624                            fork_from_name
625                     FROM RankedRegistry ranked
626                     JOIN registry_entry registry ON ranked.id = registry.id
627                     WHERE   ranked.col_rank >= :lower_bound AND
628                             ranked.col_rank < :upper_bound
629                     ORDER BY registry.id DESC
630                 """
631
